lastRunResult: Phase 4 completed: implemented custom music upload end-to-end with new custom_music_url column migration, draft/store typing for custom files, upload UI in create flow, guarded MusicPlayer support for preset or direct URL audio, preview upload to Supabase Storage (music/ prefix), POST payload + API validation/storage for customMusicUrl, and scrapbook viewer playback via src fallback. Build/lint are clean (warnings only). Progress advanced to phase 5.
